task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Hyundai Tucson (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $28750.00 and wholesale is $21800.00. Product features: Compact SUV with distinctive styling and available hybrid option. Reference: https://www.hyundaiusa.com/us/en/vehicles/tucson

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Hyundai Tucson. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Hyundai Tucson. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
